title: DAY 01 — CRM-M1 — SYLVI BRAND & PRODUCT ORIENTATION

questions.question: A customer asks: Why is this watch cheaper on Amazon than on your website? Which response correctly applies Sylvi brand voice?

options.text: We can't control Amazon's pricing — they run their own offers.
Our website price is the MRP. Marketplaces sometimes apply platform-level discounts that we don't control. The product and warranty are identical across all channels.
Amazon charges less because they have lower operating costs than us.
That's a pricing error on our end — we'll look into it.

questions.question: Which Sylvi collection features an open skeleton dial with a 33-jewel automatic movement?

options.text: Pulse Skeleton
Core-X Automatic
Timegrapher
Gazedoom

questions.question: A customer purchased a Certified Imperfect watch and now wants to return it because they don't like the cosmetic imperfection they received. What is the correct response?

options.text: Approve the return — cosmetic issues are valid return reasons
Offer a replacement for the cosmetic imperfection
Explain that Certified Imperfect watches are non-refundable and non-returnable; the imperfections were disclosed at purchase; offer to help with a mechanical defect claim if applicable
Escalate to the Asst Manager for a return approval

questions.question: A customer says: I can't find the Hawk collection on sylvi.in — is it discontinued? You check and see it is in stock. What is the most likely issue?

options.text: The collection has been renamed
The customer's pincode is not serviceable, causing the product to be hidden
The product is temporarily hidden pending a restock
The customer may be looking under the wrong category; direct them to the Men's Analog-Digital section or use the site search

questions.question: What is the correct COD policy for Certified Imperfect watches?

options.text: COD is available but requires address verification
COD is available only for orders above ₹1,000
COD is not available — Certified Imperfect watches are prepaid only
COD is available at the customer's discretion

questions.question: Which of the following correctly identifies the Sylvi brand promise?

options.text: Quality watches at unbeatable prices
Made in India for India
The watch that makes you feel like you didn't compromise
Race with Time — excellence in every tick

questions.question: A customer is upset and says: Your watch stopped working after 2 months — this is obviously a defective product. Which opening response correctly applies the Complaint / Angry Customer tone?

options.text: Sir, all our watches come with a warranty so this shouldn't happen.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. Let us quickly help resolve this for you.
This is not our fault — watches require regular servicing.
You should have registered your warranty after purchase.

questions.question: The Bella collection is a women's watch. Which of the following correctly describes it?

options.text: Square dial; premium stainless steel; minimalist design
19mm squircle case; Miyota quartz movement; butterfly buckle
Ice blue and black dial options; premium aesthetic; leather or steel link strap
Fashion bezel; glossy finish; entry-level women's

questions.question: A customer asks about estimated delivery time after dispatch. What is the correct answer?

options.text: 3–5 business days
7–10 business days
5–7 business days from dispatch date; EDD shown on the website is not a guaranteed date
Same day or next day in metro cities

questions.question: Which Sylvi men's collection has LED backlight and 12H/24H military time display, with both leather and nylon strap options?

options.text: Iconic
Bolt
Rig One 'O One WT Max
Hawk

questions.question: Sylvi was founded in which year, and in which city is it headquartered?

options.text: 2018, Mumbai
2015, Surat
2012, Bengaluru
2015, Ahmedabad

questions.question: A prototype watch customer says their watch stopped working within 5 days of delivery. What is the correct policy action?

options.text: Process a full return and refund as per standard policy
Offer a replacement — manufacturing defects on prototype watches can be replaced within 10 days of delivery
Log an RMA repair request and schedule pickup
Inform the customer that prototype watches are not covered by any policy

questions.question: Which of the following phrases should NEVER be used in a customer interaction, as it violates Sylvi brand voice?

options.text: We're happy to help you.
Let us check this for you.
You didn't follow instructions.
Thank you for your patience.

questions.question: The Imperial collection is described as slim (37mm case) with date display. Which strap material does it use?

options.text: Genuine leather — Brown, Black
Silicone — Black, Silver, Rosegold White
Nylon — Black, Khaki
Stainless steel — Silver, Black

questions.question: A customer calls asking about loyalty points. What is the correct explanation?

options.text: Loyalty points are given only on orders above ₹2,000.
Loyalty points are earned on purchases and can be redeemed for discount coupons at checkout. The balance is visible in the customer's account on sylvi.in.
Loyalty points have been discontinued — we no longer offer this program.
Loyalty points can be transferred to another customer's account.
